name: Healthcare Recruitment
description: Placement of B.Sc Nursing, GNM Nursing, Dialysis Technicians, Lab Technicians, and Allied Healthcare Professionals — for both freshers and experienced candidates, plus end-to-end hospital staffing solutions.

name: Career Counseling & Admissions
description: Guidance for higher education in India and abroad, admission support for nursing, paramedical, and professional courses, and personalized skill development & career planning.

name: Overseas Opportunities
description: Assistance for study abroad and international placements, complete documentation support, interview preparation, and pre-departure guidance.

name: Internship & Training Support
description: Hospital internships for nursing and allied healthcare students, industry partnerships, academic collaborations, and professional finishing programs.
